summary: FR-PERS-001 (Issue #13) implementation is complete and merged to main via PR #48. All three stub files replaced: ActionBar.tsx (Save button with data-testid="btn-save", async save, QuotaExceededError handling), Notification.tsx (auto-dismissing overlay, robust includes('error') detection, a11y role=status), and persistenceService.ts (saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0). All 4 test cases T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04 are passing. PR #48 was merged to main on 2026-04-15.

artifacts.name: ActionBar.tsx
artifacts.description: Save/Load/Export/Import buttons with async handlers, QuotaExceededError handling, auto-dismiss notifications

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx
artifacts.description: Success/error overlay with 3s auto-dismiss, robust includes('error') detection, a11y role=status aria-live=polite

artifacts.name: persistenceService.ts
artifacts.description: saveModel/loadModel via LocalForage with schema versioning v1.0.0 and PersistedModel interface

artifacts.name: persistenceService.test.ts
artifacts.description: Unit test T-FE-PERS-001-01: Save serializes all brick data

artifacts.name: persistenceService.performance.test.ts
artifacts.description: Integration test T-FE-PERS-001-02: Save completes within 500ms for 1000 bricks

artifacts.name: SaveModel.behavioral.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Behavioral test T-FE-PERS-001-03: Clicking Save shows success notification

artifacts.name: ActionBar.test.tsx
artifacts.description: Unit test T-FE-PERS-001-04: Save shows error when storage is full (QuotaExceededError)

artifacts.name: PR #48
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Implement FR-PERS-001 Save Model — ActionBar, Notification, persistenceService (#13) — MERGED

recommended_actions: Verify ActionBar.tsx Save button has data-testid='btn-save' and correct QuotaExceededError handling
Verify Notification.tsx uses includes('error') for robust error detection
Verify persistenceService.ts saveModel serializes all brick fields with schema version 1.0.0
Verify all 4 test cases T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04 are present and passing
Check accessibility: role=status and aria-live=polite on Notification component
